items.title: Bank Reconciliation / Rekonsiliasi bank
items.description: Match bank statement lines (AI PDF or manual) to SAP GL for a Giro and month. Set opening/closing balances; reconcile when adjusted bank equals adjusted book. Workflow: Create → Save balances → Auto-match / manual match → Submit for validation → Validate → Report / Export Excel.

items.title: Bank Reconciliation — Create / Buat rekonsiliasi
items.description: Start a session in AI mode (parse Koran PDF + fetch SAP) or Manual mode (type bank lines + fetch SAP). Select Giro, period, and Koran PDF for AI.

items.title: Bank Reconciliation — Pending validation
items.description: Validator queue for sessions submitted with Submit for validation. Validators are notified on submit. Open a session and use Validate or Reject (preparer notified on reject).

items.title: Bank Reconciliation — Report and Excel export
items.description: Formal reconciliation statement (adjusted bank vs book, reconciling items). Print from Report, or use Export Excel for a downloadable workbook.

items.title: Rekening Koran / Bank statement dashboard
items.description: Grid dashboard: one cell per account and month. Click empty cell to upload PDF; click filled cell for PDF, reconciliation status, and delete (with delete_koran).

items.title: Help panel / Bantuan aplikasi
items.description: Click the ? icon in the top bar. Ask how-to questions in the How-to tab. Answers come from docs/manuals indexed by php artisan help:reindex.

items.title: Manual Journal Entry / Jurnal umum manual
items.description: List and create manual journal entries (JE-000001 format). Balanced debit/credit lines, optional load from JE Template, Save Journal Entry, then Submit to SAP B1 from show page. Print voucher available.

items.title: Manual Journal Entry — Create
items.menu_path: Accounting → Journal Entries → New Journal Entry
items.description: Form: Date, Reference, Memo, Load from Template dropdown, dynamic Journal Lines grid (account autocomplete, Dr/Cr, amount, project, cost center). Totals must balance before Save Journal Entry.

items.title: JE Templates / Template jurnal
items.description: Shared templates for recurring journal layouts. New Template: name, description, line grid with optional default amounts. Use Load from Template when creating a JE.

items.title: Manual Journal Entry — Reverse in SAP B1
items.menu_path: Accounting → Journal Entries → (open posted JE) → Reverse in SAP B1
items.description: On a posted manual JE show page, users with cancel_sap_journal can reverse the SAP journal with a required reason.
